sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43361" key="eu)akoe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐᾱκοέω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐάκοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43361.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐηκ</ref> </xr>-.</sense> </entryFree>
